conflictOfInterest.details: Founding-stage self-operated review: reviewer principal github:VSBDev matches the accountable author principal for this candidate. Repository policy permits this when the run is isolated and provenance-disclosed, but it remains a declared self-review limitation.

evidenceChecked: candidate commit 3de005fc0d2a9ca5c5425dba1d1a5f9ae3af3311 matches HEAD; the frozen pack tree contains no assets/, diagrams/, reviews/, or adjudication files
Automated checks: candidate JSON parsed with jq; git grep found no raw HTML or Markdown image syntax in the frozen pack
npm run validate failed before pack validation because node_modules were absent and Node could not resolve package marked

findings.finding: The canonical learning path is text-first and semantically ordered, and the lesson preserves equivalent participation without requiring drag, color, speech, timed response, precise pointer input, or private disclosure. Access-constrained cases receive explicit offline text routes, and practical work stays institutionally supervised rather than being replaced with an unsafe home substitute.

No third-party media, diagrams, or dataset redistribution is declared in this candidate. thirdPartyAssets is empty, the four cited sources are repository-owned CC BY materials with dated agent-access records, and comparison against the cited internal sections did not reveal close paraphrase beyond reused internal course terminology.

Claims-mapped scenes expose learner-visible source notes, the references scene stays navigation-only with no-material-claims, and the lesson repeatedly instructs learners to use fictional or anonymized labels instead of health, disability, work, or caregiving details. That combination supports traceability while avoiding unnecessary personal-data collection in the learning route and assessment prompts.

limitations: This accessibility-and-rights review is evidence and policy checking, not legal advice; I did not perform jurisdiction-specific exception analysis beyond the repository policy and source records.

I reviewed canonical source files and bounded technical properties at the frozen commit, but I could not inspect a freshly rendered reader, print export, or zoom/reflow output because npm run validate failed before build generation: node_modules were absent and Node could not resolve marked.
Review independence is disclosed and attested, not externally verified. The reviewer principal is also the accountable author principal under the repository's founding-stage policy.
